name: Porn Prom Metal Public Company Limited
summary: Porn Prom Metal Public Company Limited distributes metal products in Thailand. The company sells copper and brass products; aluminum alloy sheets, foils, and strips; steel and stainless steel wires; aluminum roof sheets; copper tubes, pancake coils, and fittings; insulation products; spiral ducts; and welding consumables and machines. It also manufactures and distributes flexible packaging products; provides services for design, supply, and installation of electricity; assembles and exports solar cells; and sells construction materials. Porn Prom Metal Public Company Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
